expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: shipment checkpoint covers panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes
expectations.evidence: The produced outputs state the required focus, but also state it cannot be demonstrated due to missing Phase 5b artifacts: execution_notes.md: "Without these, the benchmark’s Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement and the explicit case focus (panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, visible failure/recovery outcomes) cannot be demonstrated." result.md: "Because there is no Phase 5b execution evidence, we cannot confirm ... [coverage of] panel-stack composition, embedding lifecycle boundaries, and visible failure or recovery outcomes."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: While result.md discusses Phase 5b and lists expected Phase 5b artifacts, it concludes none were produced/provided and therefore Phase 5b behavior cannot be confirmed: execution_notes.md: "No runtime/run artifacts were provided... Specifically missing... phase5b_spawn_manifest.json ... checkpoint_audit ... checkpoint_delta ... qa_plan_phase5b". result.md: "the evidence bundle provides no run artifacts... no checkpoint audit/delta, no Phase 5b draft."
